prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: The crew log for EMT bending & installation shows the required preparatory steps finished before the current operation. Hold points are signed, materials are staged in order, and no skipped step is visible in the photo set. Reference material on hand: NEC Art. 358, Ch. 9 (fill).
title: Sequence check: EMT bending & installation (commercial project)
